MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SHRINE LLC D/B/A THE SHRINE LLC'S MOTION TO DISMISS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Shrine LLC's unopposed motion for "mandatory and discretionary dismissal for failure to serve" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
